writer.name: 沃西切·卡帕斯基 Wojciech Kasperski

director.name: 沃西切·卡帕斯基 Wojciech Kasperski

introduction: Out of nowhere, somewhere in Siberia on the border to Kazachstan: a small village, a family bound together by a tragedy happened in the past. Father, mother and kids share the same history, yet they are neither able to speak about it nor trying to change and adopt their life to new circumstances. Emotionally and geographically disconnected and inability to communicate are obstacles to overcome that trauma. Violence, silence and frustration are the consequences influencing family life - no way out! This is an intimate, close look upon family life - an intimacy you would not wish to disclose.
